## Automated Patrol Repair

- Handoff source:
- Target article:
- Patrol findings addressed:

## Safety Guardrails

- [ ] Only the listed article was changed
- [ ] slug / pubDate / category / heroImage / public URL are unchanged
- [ ] `npm run build` passed
- [ ] `npm run check` passed

## Auto-merge

This template is for PRs with the `patrol-auto-fix` label. Auto-merge remains disabled until repository variable `PATROL_AUTO_MERGE_ENABLED` is set to `true`.

To stop a pending automatic merge, add the `do-not-merge` label or close the PR.
